original_registry_entry.issuing_organisation: Heart Rhythm Society, European Heart Rhythm Association, Asia Pacific Heart Rhythm Society, and Latin American Heart Rhythm Society
original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: 2023 HRS/EHRA/APHRS/LAHRS expert consensus statement on practical management of the remote device clinic
original_registry_entry.population: People with cardiovascular implantable electronic devices enrolled in in-clinic or remote device follow-up.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Cardiac device clinics, remote monitoring programs, data triage, alert review, documentation, communication, and follow-up.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for documenting CIED enrollment and connectivity context, scheduled and unscheduled transmissions, data review, alerts, qualified sign-off, communication, and follow-up. It does not interpret device data, program alerts, diagnose an event, or generate a treatment or emergency plan.

exact_sections.heading: Sections 2-3 - remote monitoring considerations, enrollment, connectivity, and follow-up
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting device and monitoring enrollment context, connectivity, scheduled follow-up, patient education, and communication responsibilities without asserting device status.

exact_sections.heading: Sections 4-5 - staffing, data triage, review, final sign-off, documentation, and communication
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting that a transmission was triaged and reviewed by qualified staff, signed off, communicated, and linked to an already decided follow-up action.

exact_sections.heading: Section 8 - alert definition, review, and communication
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports recording received alerts, priority assigned by a qualified clinic, review, communication, and emergency-system limitations without generating alert programming, urgency, diagnosis, or treatment.

title: 2023 HRS/EHRA/APHRS/LAHRS expert consensus statement on practical management of the remote device clinic
publisher: Heart Rhythm Society, European Heart Rhythm Association, Asia Pacific Heart Rhythm Society, and Latin American Heart Rhythm Society
population: People with cardiovascular implantable electronic devices enrolled in in-clinic or remote device follow-up.
intended_setting: Cardiac device clinics, remote monitoring programs, data triage, alert review, documentation, communication, and follow-up.
access_limitations: One or more PDF tables require structured extraction
Algorithm or figure references preserved as locators; diagram structure not interpreted
